title: Sali Hughes on beauty: the five makeup brushes I can’t do without
title_zh: 萨利·休斯谈美容：我不能错过的五款化妆刷
summary_en: Sali Hughes’s article offers a curated, personal inventory of five makeup brushes she deems essential, blending practical advice with subtle storytelling. By detailing each brush’s function— from the concealer brush that creates a flawless camouflage to the versatile powder brush that doubles as a blusher tool—she transforms a routine product review into a lesson on precision and confidence in beauty routines. The piece reflects broader cultural shifts toward minimalist, intentional grooming, challenging readers to reconsider the value of ‘must‑have’ items. Hughes’s expertise as a beauty journalist lends authority, while her candid anecdotes make the content approachable. This analysis highlights how seemingly mundane tools can become instruments of self‑expression, encouraging a mindful approach to consumer choices in the beauty industry.
summary_zh: 这篇文章以个人化的视角拆解了五款不可或缺的化妆刷，从实用角度切入，揭示了美容工具如何影响自信与日常表达。作者既分享了专业见解，也体现了普通消费者如何通过精简工具提升美妆体验。这不仅是购买指南，更反映了当今 beauty 文化中极简与品质的辩证关系，引发我们对‘必备’定义的反思。
best_quote_en: It magically smooshes everything back together.
best_quote_zh: 它神奇地把一切揉合在一起。

title: Modular Pretraining Enables Access Control
title_zh: 模块化预训练实现访问控制
summary_en: This post introduces Gradient‑Routed Auxiliary Modules (GRAM), a novel modular pretraining approach that enables fine‑grained access control over dangerous model capabilities. By attaching small auxiliary modules to each Transformer’s MLP layer and selectively activating them during training, GRAM isolates dual‑use knowledge (e.g., virology, cybersecurity) into dedicated modules that can be switched on or off at inference time. Experiments across model sizes from 50 M to 5 B parameters show that a single GRAM‑trained model can approximate the performance of multiple separately filtered models, matching data‑filtering baselines while offering greater flexibility. Compared with LoRA and post‑hoc unlearning (MaxEnt), GRAM demonstrates superior capability removal under sparse labeled data and better handling of novel capability combinations. The work opens promising avenues for scalable, production‑ready AI safety but also raises questions about entangled capabilities, real‑world deployment complexity, and downstream task generalization. As the community grapples with frontier model risks, GRAM represents a significant step toward modular, access‑controlled AI systems that can adapt to varying trust contexts without sacrificing overall performance.
summary_zh: 这篇研究提出 GRAM 模块化预训练，通过可开关模块隔离危险知识，在单次训练中近似实现多份数据过滤模型的效果，展现出在 5B 参数规模上的可行性，但生产落地仍面临复杂性与 entangled 能力分离等挑战。
best_quote_en: GRAM approximates separately trained, data filtered models in a single run.
best_quote_zh: GRAM 能够在单次训练中近似实现多份数据过滤模型的效果。

title: Graham Platner’s Point of No Return
title_zh: 格雷厄姆·普拉特纳的临界点
summary_en: Graham Platner’s Senate bid in Maine has hit a decisive crossroads following explosive allegations of sexual assault. The article traces how the initial #MeToo‑style accusations, previously weathered by Platner, have now escalated into a potential political extinction event, with key Democratic figures and donors urging him to drop out. It examines the broader Democratic Party dilemma: the tension between rejecting Trump‑style impunity and the emerging willingness to embrace flawed candidates as vehicles for populist anger. The piece also highlights the procedural chaos that would follow a last‑minute nominee replacement, the electability calculus in a pivotal swing state, and the symbolic trauma of a party that seems to know what it opposes but remains unclear about its own values. In doing so, it offers a nuanced look at how personal baggage, media narratives, and intra‑party power struggles intersect in contemporary American politics.
summary_zh: 普拉特纳的政治生涯在性丑闻后面临崩溃，反映出民主党在道德 Purity 与选民容忍度之间的冲突，以及政治体制对候选人纯洁性的虚伪追求。这场危机可能重塑民主党内部权力平衡与候选人筛选机制。
best_quote_en: The national pundits, the political establishment, they keep looking for that one story, that one headline, that one moment in my life that they can define the campaign by.
best_quote_zh: 那些全国专家，政治体制，总是想找到一个故事，一个头条，一个时刻来定义我的整场竞选。

title: An NFT That Saves Lives
summary_en: Noora Health’s launch of the “Save Thousands of Lives” NFT marks a bold fusion of blockchain technology and humanitarian impact. Backed by seven years of proven programs in 165 South Asian hospitals, the nonprofit saves 9 of every 1,000 newborns, achieving a record‑low $1,235 cost per life saved. The NFT’s reserve price of $2.5 million targets 2,000 lives, yet its design ensures that every dollar raised multiplies the benefit—higher bids directly fund more lives saved. By committing to transparent reporting, Noora turns a speculative asset into a data‑driven impact vehicle. This model challenges conventional fundraising, illustrating how decentralized finance can be repurposed for measurable social good. It also raises questions about scalability, donor trust, and the ethical use of NFTs beyond art and speculation. The initiative exemplifies thought leadership at the intersection of tech‑trends, business‑model innovation, and societal benefit, inviting broader scrutiny of how emerging technologies can be leveraged for life‑saving outcomes.
summary_zh: Noora Health 用“拯救成千上万条生命”的 NFT 项目，将区块链与人道主义实践结合，展现了非营利组织如何通过创新实现巨大社会价值。该项目在南亚 165 家医院落地，成功挽救了每 1,000 名新生儿中的 9 人，人均成本低达 1,235 美元。通过透明的资金追踪报告，NFT 的价值随价格上涨而放大，每多一美元就能拯救更多生命。这不仅开拓了公益 fundraising 的新模式，也引发了关于技术在社会中的伦理应用和可扩展性的深刻讨论。
best_quote_en: What a sentence to be able to write.
best_quote_zh: 能够写出这样一句话是多么美妙。

title: Optimiser Choice Can Amplify or Suppress Emergent Misalignment
title_zh: 优化器选择可以放大或抑制新兴失调
summary_en: This paper investigates how training choices shape emergent misalignment (EM) in fine‑tuned language models. The authors show that the optimiser is by far the dominant factor, dwarfing model size or architecture. Across 12 models, misalignment rates are roughly uniform for parameters above 1 B, contradicting the intuition that larger models are more prone to EM. Optimisers that concentrate LoRA updates into a few singular directions (e.g., Adam, Lion) produce markedly higher misalignment, while Muon’s orthogonal updates spread the adaptation more uniformly and preserve alignment. A key insight is that EM appears downstream of the adapter’s spectral shape: regularising the spectrum to be flatter recovers alignment with virtually no loss penalty, even eliminating EM entirely for Adam on insecure‑code data. The work also uncovers puzzling outliers—SGD’s behaviour diverges, and regularisation worsens its alignment—hinting at deeper geometric mechanisms. Beyond the empirical sweep, the authors outline fertile future directions: on‑policy EM, interactions with other emergent phenomena, hyperparameter sweeps, and broader generalisation effects. While the author’s focus has shifted to Developmental Cognitive Interpretability, this study offers a concrete, actionable roadmap for the community to mitigate EM cheaply and to probe the loss‑alignment landscape more systematically.
summary_zh: 研究揭示优化器选择对AI模型的“新兴失调”影响远大于模型规模。通过调整LoRA适配器的谱线形，引入正则化即可有效缓解失调，甚至彻底消除Adam在不安全代码训练中的EM。这表明微小的训练过程调整可能比扩大规模更具成本效益。我们期待更多关于优化器机制的探索，以及其在RL和其他现象中的延伸应用。
best_quote_en: Optimiser choice strongly influences emergent misalignment, while model size and family seem to barely matter.
best_quote_zh: 优化器选择对新兴失调有重大影响，而模型规模和家族几乎无关紧要。

title: The sights and sounds of Bhutan
summary_en: The author recounts a long‑awaited trip to Bhutan, a tiny kingdom wedged between India and China that has preserved its Buddhist traditions and unique governance for centuries. From the king’s personal generosity during Covid to the nation’s carbon‑negative status and its Gross National Happiness philosophy, the piece reveals how Bhutan’s policies prioritize cultural preservation, environmental stewardship, and collective well‑being over conventional economic metrics. The narrative balances awe at the country’s breathtaking scenery and architectural uniformity with a critical look at modern challenges: youth emigration, the slow rollout of infrastructure like Gelephu Mindfulness City, and the tension between tradition and development. By weaving personal anecdotes, historical context, and vivid observations, the article serves as both an inspirational travelogue and a thoughtful case study of an alternative societal model, inviting readers to consider what a happier, more sustainable future might look like.
summary_zh: 作者踏上了向往已久的不丹之旅，探索这个被印度和中国包围的微小王国如何数百年来守护着佛教传统与独特治理。从国王在疫情期间的个人慷慨到不丹成为全球唯一碳负国，从注重国民幸福而非GDP的政策到年轻人外流与未来城市规划，这篇文章既是迷人的旅行叙事，也是对另一种社会模式的深刻反思，启发我们重新思考幸福与可持续发展的真谛。
best_quote_en: The king gave these families $120/month, enough to get by on until the industry came back. He paid this out of his own pocket, nearly to the point of personal bankruptcy.
best_quote_zh: 国王每月给这些家庭120美元，足够维持生活直到旅游业复苏。他从自己的腰包里掏钱，几乎穷光了自己。

title: Essentials: The Science & Treatment of Obsessive Compulsive Disorder (OCD)
summary_en: In this Huberman Lab Essentials episode, Andrew Huberman unpacks the neurobiology and psychology of obsessive‑compulsive disorder, revealing how repetitive thought‑action loops are anchored in cortico‑striatal‑thalamic circuitry. A striking insight is that compulsive behaviors reinforce the very obsessions they aim to quell, a finding that reshapes therapeutic expectations. The episode evaluates the efficacy of exposure‑based cognitive behavioral therapy and SSRIs, highlighting research that compares each modality alone versus in combination. A detailed clinical protocol is presented, guiding patients into controlled anxiety states while suppressing compulsions, thereby retraining the brain to break the OCD cycle. Huberman’s expert synthesis of cutting‑edge studies, treatment comparisons, and actionable protocols offers both a deep scientific understanding and practical tools for anyone seeking to comprehend or address OCD.
summary_zh: 本期探讨了强迫症的神经生物学基础，揭示了反复的‘思维-行为循环’机制，以及为何强迫行为会强化 obsessions。专家介绍了 CBT、SSRIs 等治疗方法及其联合应用，并分享了引导患者进入焦虑状态以打破 OCD 循环的临床协议。内容兼具科学深度与实用指导，引发对心理健康干预的深刻反思。
best_quote_en: Compulsive actions actually strengthen the underlying obsessions rather than relieve them.
best_quote_zh: 强迫行为实际上会强化潜在的强迫思维，而非缓解它们。

title: The Real Reason to End the Death Penalty
summary_en: The essay dismantles the abstract moral debate about capital punishment by exposing a grim reality: the death penalty routinely executes innocent people. Through a series of harrowing exonerations—ranging from DNA‑backed releases to discredited forensic testimony—the author shows how systemic pressures on police, prosecutors, and courts create a perfect storm for wrongful convictions. The piece argues that the theoretical questions of deterrence or retribution become irrelevant when the process itself is fundamentally broken, turning state‑sanctioned killing into state‑sanctioned murder. By cataloguing dozens of cases and highlighting institutional incentives that prioritize convictions over truth, the article reframes the death penalty not as a justice issue but as a failure of due process. The implication is stark: any legal system that cannot safeguard the innocent cannot claim moral authority, making abolition a prerequisite for justice rather than a policy preference.
summary_zh: 这篇文章通过一系列无辜者被判死刑的案例，揭露了司法体系的深层危机：警察、检察官和法院为求破案不惜牺牲真相。作者认为，当制度激励导向有罪判决时，关于威慑或道德的理论讨论变得无关紧要。真正的问题在于制度性的无能与欺骗，这意味着废除死刑是恢复公正的必然选择，而非政策考量。
best_quote_en: This circus of incompetence and dishonesty is the real issue with the death penalty.
best_quote_zh: 正是这种无能和欺骗的闹剧是死刑的真正问题。

title: Stories of the future are undermined by agent assumptions
title_zh: 未来的故事被代理假设所破坏
summary_en: Jonas Hallgren argues that many AI safety forecasts are subtly shaped by unexamined assumptions about the nature of future agents—whether they will be humans, institutions, AI models, or hybrid collectives. He shows how these ontological commitments act as "black boxes" that limit predictive models, drawing parallels to complexity science, the Game of Life, and the limits of agent‑based modeling. The piece critiques linear forecasts, highlights the difficulty of modeling unknown unknowns, and calls for more antifragile governance designs that embrace uncertainty rather than demanding false certainty. Hallgren suggests looking to biology and distributed cognition for new frameworks, positioning the article as both a diagnostic of current forecasting blind spots and a guide for researchers seeking more robust, adaptive approaches to AI and societal modeling. It is a thought‑provoking blend of technical insight, philosophical questioning, and practical recommendations for the next decade of AI development.
summary_zh: Hallgren 指出，许多 AI 安全预测暗含着关于未来代理（agents）的假设——它们是人类、机构、AI 模型还是混合体。这些未检验的假设限制了预测模型。他通过复杂性科学、生命游戏和代理建模的局限性进行阐述，批判线性预测，强调建模未知未知的困难，并呼吁设计更具抗脆弱性的治理体系以应对不确定性。他建议从生物学和分布式认知中寻找灵感，将代理视为可合并、分裂和重绘边界的过程。最后，他提出了一个通往更普适性不确定性处理框架的愿景，犹如适应性机构的风洞。
best_quote_en: We need stories of what will happen as a way of communicating the risks but claiming certainty in any specific story leaves you very open to black swans.
best_quote_zh: 我们需要讲故事来传达风险，但声称任何特定故事是确定的，会让我们很容易受到黑天鹅事件的影响.

title: Tales from Toddlerhood
summary_en: In "Tales from Toddlerhood," the author shares a series of wry, self‑deprecating observations about life with a two‑year‑old. He discovers the paradox of being simultaneously "completely obsessed with and dramatically bored by the same person," captures the toddler’s dictatorial tendencies, and laments the social fatigue of endless baby‑video sharing. The piece also highlights how toddlers can be both linguistic prodigies and comically confused—mastering language overnight yet misusing pronouns. Through humor and personal reflection, the author offers a candid look at the cognitive leaps, emotional turbulence, and social awkwardness that define early childhood. The essay serves as both a relatable parenting diary and a subtle commentary on how modern technology amplifies parental exhibitionism. By blending intimate anecdotes with broader cultural critique, the post invites readers to reconsider the paradox of love, exhaustion, and the relentless desire to document fleeting developmental milestones.
summary_zh: 本文以幽默的笔触记录了作者与两岁女儿共同生活的点滴：对同一孩子的极度迷恋与深深厌倦并存，幼儿的“专制”行为，分享视频所引发的社会疲劳，以及他们既是语言天才又是语用小白的行为。作者通过个人经历反映了现代父母对孩子成长记录的痴迷与反思，引发读者对科技时代家庭生活的新思考。
best_quote_en: You can be simultaneously completely obsessed with and dramatically bored by the same person.
best_quote_zh: 你可以同时完全迷恋又极度厌倦同一个人的感觉。

title: Travel Noise Machine/Golden Visas/Easier TSA PreCheck
title_zh: 旅行降噪机/黄金签证/更便捷的TSA预检
summary_en: Tim Leffel’s newsletter delivers four concise insights that span travel tech, global residency strategies, workplace psychology, and digital identity. The first bite reviews the LectroFan Alpha, a lightweight USB‑rechargeable noise machine that offers ocean, fan, pink and brown noise options—useful not only for families but also for travelers seeking quiet. The second highlights the dwindling yet still viable “golden visa” programs, where over 30 countries provide residency or citizenship in exchange for substantial investments, a trend now being recalibrated after past excesses. The third bite presents a scholarly study revealing that narcissistic leaders resist remote work because physical proximity fuels their need for visibility and control, framing the RTO debate as a power dynamic rather than productivity concern. Finally, the newsletter announces that TSA PreCheck enrollment can now be stored directly in Google Wallet, automatically linking digital IDs across more than 100 airlines and simplifying the verification process. Together, these snippets illustrate how small technological upgrades, policy shifts, and human psychology intersect to reshape everyday travel and work experiences.
summary_zh: 这份通讯提供了四则简短的见解，涵盖旅行降噪设备、黄金签证政策、推动返岗的领导者自恋心理，以及TSA预检在谷歌钱包中的应用。它们展示了技术改进、政策变化与人类心理如何影响我们的旅行与工作体验。
best_quote_en: The sparseness of remote communication can make it more difficult for narcissists to satisfy these cravings for power and status.
best_quote_zh: 远程沟通的稀疏性会让自恋者更难以满足他们对权力和地位的渴望。

summary_en: Altman’s sprawling post blends personal vulnerability with a manifesto on AI’s promise and peril. After a nighttime Molotov attack on his home, he reflects on how words and narratives can ignite real danger, then pivots to his core beliefs: AI is an unparalleled tool for human advancement, but its rapid rise demands robust safety, democratization, and societal resilience. He candidly admits past mistakes, the toll of internal conflict, and the shift from a scrappy startup to a major platform, while expressing pride in OpenAI’s mission breakthroughs. The piece also diagnoses the industry’s “ring of power” dynamics around AGI, arguing that broad sharing and democratic oversight are the only antidotes to concentration and drama. Altman’s call for de‑escalating rhetoric underscores a yearning for constructive dialogue amid high‑stakes technological change. The essay serves both as a humanizing personal account and a thoughtful policy‑oriented roadmap, urging stakeholders to balance optimism with responsibility as AI reshapes society.
summary_zh: Altman 在遭受袭击后，既分享了家庭的脆弱，也提出了关于 AI 的愿景与责任。他强调 AI 是人类能力的强大工具，但需要安全、民主化和广泛的社会参与；反思了 OpenAI 的成长痛楚，并呼吁减少行业争斗，以更理性的对话面对未来。
best_quote_en: AI will be the most powerful tool for expanding human capability and potential that anyone has ever seen.
best_quote_zh: 人工智能将成为人类历史上最强大的工具，能够扩展人类的能力和潜能。

title: Measuring Is Not Enough Anymore
summary_en: The article argues that merely measuring AI capabilities—exemplified by METR’s celebrated time‑horizon graph—offers diminishing returns for AI safety. While such metrics inform researchers, investors, and policymakers, they often amplify capability‑driven incentives and shift power toward industry and governments, potentially worsening existential risk. The author reflects on personal involvement in capability evaluations and contends that the most visible impact of these measurements is not safer outcomes but a self‑fulfilling prophecy that accelerates development. By likening the time‑horizon experiment to Moore’s Law, the piece highlights how predictive metrics can become prescriptive, shaping the very trajectory they seek to assess. The author calls for a re‑weighting of AI safety work toward more opinionated, direction‑setting research that steers development onto a saner path, rather than simply charting how insane the current path already is. This critical perspective urges the community to move beyond measurement and toward purposeful guidance.
summary_zh: 衡量已不再足够，我们不应只是精确测量AI发展的疯狂轨迹，而应塑造更理性的发展方向。这是关于AI安全工作重新定位的深刻反思，呼唤更宏大的愿景。这提醒我们，指标本身可能强化错误激励，需重新平衡评估重点。
best_quote_en: We should be more ambitious, should mold the trajectory of AI development into a more sane one instead of getting a precise measurement of exactly how insane the current trajectory is.
best_quote_zh: 我们应该更有雄心，应当塑造AI发展的轨迹，使其变得更加理性，而不是仅仅精确地测量当前轨迹有多么疯狂。

title: Easy Whole Set Dances With a Hook
summary_en: In this personal blog, jefftk explores the design challenges of creating easy whole‑set dances for parties, focusing on simplicity, musical alignment, and quick teachability. He outlines a philosophy of using a minimal set of building blocks while incorporating a distinctive “hook” figure to keep dances fresh, and shares concrete examples such as Jacob’s Potato and Charge and Drag. By soliciting ideas from the Trad Callers mailing list, he expands his repertoire with Witch’s Reel and Falling Masonry, and saves two slightly more complex options for when the crowd is ready. The post reflects a thoughtful, iterative approach to choreography—balancing low piece count with novelty—and offers practical guidance for anyone seeking beginner‑friendly, space‑efficient dances that can be taught and dropped in and out of quickly. It underscores the value of community input and the joy of refining a craft through real‑world testing.
summary_zh: jefftk 分享了如何设计简单全套派对舞蹈的思考，强调快速教学、音乐配合和低重复性。他提出用少量基本动作构建舞蹈，同时加入“钩子”这一新颖元素以保持趣味性，并列举了几个经典案例。经过社区征集，他新增了 Witch’s Reel 和 Falling Masonry 等舞蹈，还保留了两套稍复杂的内容以适应不同场合。这篇文章展现了从实战中提炼和优化 choreographic 理念的过程，为初学者提供了易于学习、空间节约且能迅速上手的实践指南。
best_quote_en: I want to be able to teach it in a single fast‑paced walkthrough, match it tightly to the musical phrase, and be able to drop out after a few times through.
best_quote_zh: 我希望能够用一个快速的教学 walkthrough 讲完它，紧紧地配合音乐节奏，并在几遍之后就能退出。

title: Can Office-to-Residential Conversions Survive the Pfizer-Building Crisis?
title_zh: 办公楼改住宅改造能否抵御辉瑞大楼危机？
summary_en: The article chronicles the near‑collapse of New York’s Pfizer Building during a high‑stakes office‑to‑residential conversion led by developer Nathan Berman. Once celebrated for rapidly repurposing vacant office towers into luxury apartments, Berman’s project now faces structural failures, labor disputes, and scrutiny over safety shortcuts. The piece reveals how aggressive density‑maximizing tactics—adding floors, skimping on steel, and bypassing unions—created a perfect storm of risk. It also highlights broader urban pressures: a chronic housing shortage, political urgency to repurpose mid‑century office stock, and a regulatory environment that sometimes struggles to keep pace with rapid development. Berman’s candid admission that overloading unsupported structures leads to collapse underscores the human cost of treating cityscape as a Rubik’s Cube. The crisis suggests a potential shift in the real‑estate niche, with developers likely to face higher premiums for safety and tighter oversight, reshaping the economics of conversion projects across Manhattan.
summary_zh: 纽约办公楼改造项目遭遇结构崩塌危机，暴露出安全隐患与劳资矛盾。开发者伯曼的‘加负荷’策略引发反思，城市住房短缺与监管不足并存。这场危机或重塑房地产开发模式，也警示快速增密住宅化可能带来的风险。
best_quote_en: You add more load to something that can't support it... it'll give way, and that's what happened, and now it just needs to be fixed.
best_quote_zh: 你往无法承受的东西上加负荷...它就会崩溃，这就是发生了的事，现在只需要修复。

title: Sora update #1
summary_en: OpenAI’s recent post about the Sora update reveals a rapid, iterative approach to AI video generation that mirrors the early dynamism of ChatGPT. The company is responding to strong creator demand by granting rightsholders granular control over character usage, introducing an opt‑in model that lets them decide how (or whether) their likenesses appear in user‑generated content. This shift not only empowers intellectual‑property owners but also signals a move toward more responsible AI deployment. Simultaneously, OpenAI acknowledges the need for a sustainable revenue model, planning to share earnings with rights holders whose characters are used, aiming to balance innovation with fair compensation. The announcement underscores a broader industry trend: AI products are evolving from experimental prototypes to mature platforms that must navigate legal, ethical, and economic complexities. By committing to frequent updates and rapid feedback loops, OpenAI hopes to refine Sora’s capabilities while setting a precedent for transparent, stakeholder‑centric development across its product suite.
summary_zh: OpenAI 宣布 Sora 将推出两项重大变更：赋予版权方更细致的角色生成控制权，并建立视频生成收入分享机制。这反映了 AI 从实验向成熟平台的转变，也体现了对知识产权和公平补偿的关注。作者反思了这一迭代过程，认为这将重塑创作者与 AI 之间的互动关系，并为整个产品线树立了透明、响应式的开发范式。
best_quote_en: Please expect a very high rate of change from us; it reminds me of the early days of ChatGPT.
best_quote_zh: 请期待我们很快会带来高频的变更，这让我想起了ChatGPT的初期阶段。

title: Are middle-aged women really invisible? I see them everywhere – and not just in the mirror | Emma Beddington
title_zh: 中年女性真的被忽视了吗？我到处都能看到她们——不仅仅是镜中自我 | 艾玛·贝丁顿
summary_en: Emma Beddington interrogates the cultural myth of the invisible middle‑aged woman, weaving personal anecdotes with high‑profile examples such as Gillian Anderson and Rose Byrne. She critiques the pervasive sexism and ageism that render women’s visibility contingent on youth and capital, while highlighting a growing backlash: prominent figures and brands are reframing aging as a source of power and market value. The essay underscores how systemic under‑investment in women’s health and research fuels this erasure, yet also notes a burgeoning commercial interest in the demographic. Beddington’s wry humor and intellectual curiosity reveal a paradox—visibility is both a privilege and a trap—prompting readers to reconsider what society deems ‘prime’ and who gets to define it. The piece serves as both a sociological analysis and a call for redefining middle‑aged womanhood beyond the mirror.
summary_zh: 艾玛·贝丁顿以个人观察和名人事例探讨了中年女性被忽视的传说。她揭露了性别与年龄偏见如何使女性的可见性依赖于资本与青春，同时也描述了日益强大的反击：名人品牌将中年视为市场潜力。这篇文章批判了女性健康研究资金不足的现象，并指出商业利益正在利用“ invisibility”话题。作者以机智与思考，揭示了可见性背后的矛盾，呼唤人们重新定义中年女性的价值与社会地位。
best_quote_en: I’m not vanishing… I even feel, quite regularly, that I am in some kind of prime.
best_quote_zh: 我并没有消失……我甚至经常觉得自己正处于某种巅峰时期。

title: How People Get Rich Now
summary_en: The article traces the dramatic shift in how America’s wealthiest accumulate fortunes from 1982 to 2020. It shows that inheritance, oil, and real‑estate once dominated, but by 2020 the majority of new wealth came from technology‑driven startups and venture‑backed ventures. The piece argues that 1982 was the anomaly, not 2020, because earlier eras (e.g., the Gilded Age) also featured entrepreneurial fortunes. Key drivers of the modern surge include plummeting startup costs, faster growth rates, abundant venture capital, and a power reversal where investors now need founders more than vice‑versa. These forces have amplified founder wealth and widened inequality, offering a structural explanation beyond simple political narratives. The analysis underscores that the rise of tech‑focused companies represents a qualitative change in wealth creation, moving from deal‑making and resource extraction to superior technology and rapid scaling. Understanding these mechanisms reveals why entrepreneurship is becoming the default path to great wealth and why the Gini coefficient continues to rise.
summary_zh: 文章深入探讨了1982年至2020年间美国顶尖富豪财富来源的转变，揭示出创业企业和科技公司如何成为新财富引擎。成本降低、增长加速及风险投资的兴起，赋予创始人前所未有的权力，推动更多人通过创业致富，反映了历史周期的自然更替。
best_quote_en: People get richer from starting companies now than they did in 1982, because the companies do different things.
best_quote_zh: 人们如今从创业中获得财富比1982年更多，因为公司的运作方式不同。

title: An Epistemic Audit for Existential Risks from AI
title_zh: 人工智能存在风险的认识审计
summary_en: Alexander Müller introduces an Epistemic Audit that turns abstract concerns about AI existential risk into a structured, repeatable self‑assessment. By mapping beliefs across capability, agency, alignment, takeoff, and mitigation domains, the tool forces readers to distinguish what they know from what they merely assume. It quantifies uncertainty on a three‑point scale and tracks confidence direction, turning personal judgment into comparable data. The audit not only highlights knowledge gaps but also guides research effort toward questions that would most shift one’s overall risk estimate. Müller positions the framework as a shared language for cruxes, enabling collaborative evidence‑sharing and longitudinal analysis. While the specific questions are not novel, the protocol’s emphasis on measurable, falsifiable beliefs and its potential for aggregation across respondents represent a methodological advance. The approach appeals to newcomers seeking a systematic entry point and to seasoned researchers looking for a tool to prioritize inquiry and coordinate discourse on one of humanity’s most consequential technological trajectories.
summary_zh: 这篇文章提出了一个自我审视工具，通过量化不确定性帮助研究者聚焦关键问题。它将存在风险分解为因果链，促使读者明确信念边界，并指导下一步学习。框架的可重复性与协作性，或将重塑AI风险研究的方法。
best_quote_en: The questions where your uncertainty is high and which would move your overall view are exactly the ones you should study next.
best_quote_zh: 那些让你不确定且可能改变整体观点的问题，正是你应该优先研究的问题。

title: Write Simply
summary_en: This essay champions the virtue of plain language in writing, arguing that simplicity enhances reader engagement and idea retention. The author illustrates how reducing linguistic friction allows thoughts to surface more directly, likening ideal prose to the Italian "saltimbocca"—a bite that leaps into the mouth. By trimming unnecessary complexity, writers avoid pretentiousness and make their work accessible to a global, non‑native audience. The piece also highlights that simple writing endures across cultural and linguistic shifts, serving as a hallmark of craftsmanship. While acknowledging that stylistic flourish has its place, the author stresses intentionality over accidental obscurity. Through a reflective, almost meditative tone, the article offers practical guidance: draft quickly, then edit ruthlessly, cutting away excess to reveal clarity. It is both a philosophical manifesto and a hands‑on tutorial for anyone who wishes to communicate ideas with honesty, impact, and lasting relevance.
summary_zh: 简单写作并非炫耀技巧，而是让读者专注于思想。它教导我们通过简洁表达传递更深层次见解，并关注全球多元读者的需求。这篇文章揭示了清晰沟通的艺术，以及为何简洁是真正高超的写作技艺。
best_quote_en: the ideas leap into your head and you barely notice the words that got them there.
best_quote_zh: 思想跃入你的脑海，你几乎察觉不到将它们带到这里的文字。

title: Toy Models of Initialisation Effects on RL Dynamics
title_zh: 强化学习动态中的初始化效应玩具模型
summary_en: This article presents a follow‑up to Geodesic’s research on the pre‑RL alignment checkpoint, using a simple toy model to illustrate how initialization shapes reinforcement learning dynamics. The authors examine three key phenomena: rich‑get‑richer effects where early‑explored high‑reward actions dominate; underspecified behaviors that persist because reward functions ignore certain aspects of performance; and cognition underspecification, where internal reasoning patterns are not directly rewarded. By comparing deterministic full‑gradient updates with finite‑sample RLOO rollouts, the paper shows that sampling noise amplifies the impact of initial probabilities, making favorable initialization crucial for steering models toward desired outcomes. The analysis also highlights that even when a higher‑reward solution exists, sufficient optimization pressure can drive the model toward a lower‑reward but more easily exploitable behavior unless initialization biases it otherwise. The work offers both intuitive visualizations and rigorous proofs, making it a valuable resource for researchers and practitioners seeking to understand and control early‑stage RL learning. Interactive widgets and appendices further deepen the insight, encouraging readers to experiment with hyperparameters and reward structures.
summary_zh: 本文通过玩具模型深入探讨了初始化如何影响强化学习动态，揭示了富者愈富、行为未指定及认知未指定等关键现象。作者比较了确定性梯度和有限样本更新，发现采样噪声会放大初始概率的影响，因此有利的初始化对引导模型走向预期结果至关重要。文章还指出，在优化压力下，模型可能偏向于低奖励但易于利用的策略，除非初始化提供偏向性。研究结合直观可视化与严谨证明，为理解和控制早期RL学习提供了宝贵视角。
best_quote_en: The solution that the model learns can depend importantly on the initial strategies into which it explores.
best_quote_zh: 模型学习到的解决方案可能严重依赖于它最初探索的策略。

title: Inside ICE’s Largest Detention Center
summary_en: The article reveals how the Trump administration’s strategy of making detention conditions deliberately harsh drives immigrants to leave voluntarily, while exposing the human cost of sprawling tent facilities like Camp East Montana at Fort Bliss. Built on a military base with minimal infrastructure, the center became a symbol of policy brutality, plagued by safety lapses, legal challenges, and systemic neglect. Through personal stories—Rey’s sudden arrest, Sara’s frantic search, and detainees’ daily struggles—the piece illustrates how bureaucratic decisions and profit‑driven contracts create environments that dehumanize vulnerable populations. It also highlights the role of legal advocacy, media scrutiny, and political maneuvering in shaping immigration enforcement, urging readers to consider the ethical implications of using temporary, low‑cost facilities for long‑term human confinement.
summary_zh: 冰火两重天——从El Paso到西 Texas的移民拘留中心，揭示了政策如何将脆弱群体推入极端困境，折射出制度冷酷与人性挣扎的复杂面，引发深刻反思。
best_quote_en: The Trump Administration's goal, a former ICE official said, "is to make detention look and feel so bad that people leave."
best_quote_zh: 特朗普政府的目标，某前ICE官员说，‘就是让拘留条件看起来和感觉上都很糟糕，让人想离开。’

title: Sora 2
summary_en: The launch of Sora 2 marks a bold step toward democratizing video creation, positioning the new app as a "ChatGPT for creativity" that promises to turn ideas into polished videos with unprecedented speed and ease. The announcement highlights a potential Cambrian explosion of creative output, emphasizing features like character consistency and social cameo integration that could reshape how we connect and express ourselves visually. Yet the post is careful not to ignore the darker side of AI‑driven media, acknowledging risks of addiction, bullying, and algorithmic "slop feeds." The team outlines a principled approach centered on long‑term user satisfaction, user‑controlled feeds, creation empowerment, and goal‑aligned assistance, backed by safeguards against misuse and wellbeing monitoring. This blend of visionary optimism and sober responsibility offers a compelling case study in how emerging AI tools might be guided toward socially beneficial outcomes while navigating ethical complexity.
summary_zh: Sora 2 号称是创意领域的 ChatGPT 时刻，承诺让视频创作变得简单而丰富，同时也正视 AI 带来的社会风险。文章既描绘了创意可能迎来大爆发的愿景，也提出了长期满意度、用户控制、创作优先等原则，展现了公司对平衡创新与责任的思考。
best_quote_en: Creativity could be about to go through a Cambrian explosion, and along with it, the quality of art and entertainment can drastically increase.
best_quote_zh: 创意可能即将迎来一场寒武纪大爆发，艺术和娱乐的质量也将大幅提升。

title: How Brussels can avoid becoming a digital vassal to US Big Tech
title_zh: 布鲁塞尔如何避免沦为美国大科技的数字附庸
summary_en: The article argues that Europe’s growing tech dependency—centered on a handful of US firms controlling AI models, chips, cloud, and standards—has become a structural threat rather than a series of isolated incidents. It highlights the June 2026 US export‑control order that blocked foreign access to cutting‑edge AI models, exposing how Washington can single‑handedly dictate global AI usage. While the ban was later rescinded, the episode revealed that existing EU regulatory tools (fines, audits, compliance theater) are insufficient against firms that have become "tech extensive"—deeply embedded across infrastructure and decision systems. The author proposes a two‑track strategy: first, build European capacity through coordinated industrial policy, funding, and talent attraction; second, constrain Big Tech structurally by setting market‑shaping standards, treating systemic players differently, and using mechanisms like the DMA’s behavioral remedies. The piece serves as a policy‑forward, expert‑insight guide for anyone seeking to understand, solve, analyze, and guide European efforts to reclaim digital sovereignty.
summary_zh: 文章指出，欧洲对美国科技企业的结构性依赖已成为重大威胁，从芯片到云服务、AI模型无不受制。2026年6月美国出口管制令临时封锁了外国用户访问最新AI模型的权利，凸显了华盛顿的单边影响力。欧盟现有的监管工具（罚款、审计、合规表演）已无法有效约束这些“科技规模庞大”的企业。作者提出双轨战略：首先，通过产业政策、资金支持和人才吸引构建欧洲能力；其次，通过市场标准和结构性约束（如DMA的行为补救措施）对大型科技企业实施差异化监管。该文为政策制定者和关注欧洲数字主权者提供深入的分析和可行的解决方案。
best_quote_en: The most important AI‑governance development of 2026 so far wasn’t a model release. It was an export‑control order.
best_quote_zh: 2026年迄今为止最重要的AI治理发展不是模型发布，而是出口管制令。

title: Donate Unrestricted
summary_en: The article argues that unrestricted donations are far more effective than restricted ones for nonprofits. While donors often impose conditions—seeking visibility, compliance, or personal agendas—the nonprofit typically knows best how to allocate resources. Restricted gifts can inadvertently support incompetent organizations or misdirected projects, whereas unrestricted funds empower experts to address real needs. The piece highlights rare exceptions, such as umbrella organizations or donors with deep domain expertise like the Gates Foundation. It also critiques the power imbalance that discourages nonprofits from challenging donors, urging contributors to trust proven entities with full discretion. By choosing unrestricted giving, donors maximize impact, avoid wasteful publicity stunts, and respect the nonprofit’s mission-driven judgment. The essay blends sharp analysis with a call to action, encouraging a shift in donor behavior toward more responsible and effective philanthropy.
summary_zh: 这篇文章尖锐地指出，无限制捐赠远胜于限制性捐款。捐赠者往往出于宣传或合规等目的设限，而非盈利机构更了解实际需求。限制性捐款可能支持不称职的组织或错失重点。作者列举了大学等伞式组织和盖茨基金会等专家捐赠者的例外情况，并揭示了权力不对称如何抑制非盈利机构的直言不讳。文章呼吁捐赠者信任专业机构，给予无限制资金，从而提升捐赠效能，避免空洞的宣传 stunt。这是一篇兼具深度分析与实践指导的反思性文章。
best_quote_en: If you trust them to spend your money, trust them to decide how.
best_quote_zh: 如果你信任他们花钱，就信任他们决定怎么花。

title: The fundamental fallacy of language
summary_en: Sunny from QAD explores how language’s inherent ambiguity leads us to mistake sentences for propositions and words for concepts, assuming a single objective meaning. The article argues that interpretation is a richer, more charitable process: we must survey multiple plausible meanings before reacting, using examples like "I’m exactly six feet tall" and the structure of the piece itself to illustrate spectrum versus bucket thinking. This fallacy has practical implications for communication, reading comprehension, and even AI systems that attempt to parse human text. By encouraging readers to ask what they can agree with rather than what they can argue against, the piece offers a pragmatic mantra for reducing misunderstanding. The analysis is both intellectually rigorous and personally engaging, reminding us that careful, empathetic interpretation is essential for meaningful dialogue.
summary_zh: 语言充满歧义，我们常以为文本有唯一含义，实则需从众多可能意义中挑选最合理者。作者提醒我们，阅读时先求同而非求异，这才是避免误解的关键，也是建立更包容对话的起点。
best_quote_en: When reading a text, don't ask what there is to argue with; ask what there is to agree with.
best_quote_zh: 阅读文本时，不要问有什么可反驳的，要问有什么可认同的.

title: Spain’s Beautiful Balance
summary_en: Louisa Thomas captures the nuanced narrative of Spain’s journey to the 2026 World Cup final, focusing on the interplay between prodigious talent and collective discipline. The article profiles Lamine Yamal, an 18‑year‑old phenom whose early fame and ego could have derailed the team, yet his maturity and willingness to blend into the tactical fabric prove pivotal. Thomas highlights how Spain’s success stems not from individual flashes but from a “beautiful balance” of structured play, patient pressing, and Rodri’s masterful midfield anchor work. The piece contrasts expectations of youthful stardom with the reality of team‑oriented strategy, offering readers insight into modern soccer’s evolving dynamics. It also examines the psychological dimensions of handling fame, the leadership required to sustain harmony, and the broader lesson that true excellence often lies beneath highlight reels. This analysis serves as both a compelling sports story and a case study in collaborative success, making it valuable for fans, analysts, and anyone interested in high‑performance teamwork.
summary_zh: 托马斯以细腻的笔触描绘了西班牙队如何在2026年世界杯决赛中实现天才与纪律的平衡。年轻球星拉米恩·亚马尔（Lamine Yamal）的成熟与团队协作精神成为关键。文章指出，西班牙的胜利源于“美丽的平衡”：精妙的战术配合、耐心的高压逼抢，以及中场大将罗德里的出色控场。这不仅是一场体育盛事，更是一堂关于当今足球中团队精神与心理素质的课，揭示了耀眼光环背后的真实实力。
best_quote_en: There is more to soccer than what you can see in the highlights or on the score sheet. Recognizing this is a skill that Yamal seems to be mastering early.
best_quote_zh: 足球远不止高亮片段或比分表能展示的东西。认识到这一点是杨阿尔正在早日掌握的技能。

title: What’s in my NOW? — Editor Edition
title_zh: 我现在的拥有什么？——编辑版
summary_en: Claudia Dawson invites readers into her personal ecosystem of tools and philosophies that shape her "NOW." She blends physical modalities—full‑body red light therapy, Solfeggio tuning forks, and a portable massage table—with digital aids like AudioPen for dream transcription and the ACER Integration community for nature‑based spiritual work. Underlying this inventory is the Ubuntu philosophy, reminding us that growth occurs relationally, not in isolation. The piece serves as both a practical guide for anyone exploring holistic wellness and an inspirational reflection on how technology, ritual, and community can support embodied spiritual development. By sharing her curated toolkit, Dawson offers actionable steps for readers seeking to integrate alternative healing practices into daily life while grounding transcendent experiences in everyday relational work.
summary_zh: 克劳迪娅·道森分享了她个人工具与哲学清单，从红光疗法、共振叉到数字应用与社区，展现了身心灵整合的实践。乌班图哲学“人唯藉他人方为己人”成为核心思想，指出成长并非孤立。她以个人视角提供实用指南，激励读者探索替代疗法，并将超验体验融入日常生活中的关系与挑战中。
best_quote_en: I am because we are.
best_quote_zh: 我之所以存在，因为我们存在。

title: Essentials: The Science & Treatment of Bipolar Disorder
title_zh: 必需品：双相情感障碍的科学与治疗
summary_en: This Huberman Lab Essentials episode provides a comprehensive exploration of bipolar disorder, covering its biological foundations, diagnostic criteria, and evidence-based treatment approaches. The content delves into the remarkable history of lithium discovery, explaining its mechanisms of reducing inflammation and providing neuroprotection. Dr. Huberman examines various treatment modalities including pharmacological interventions, psychotherapies, electroconvulsive therapy, and nutraceuticals like omega-3 fatty acids. The episode also explores the intriguing relationship between mood disorders and creativity, offering valuable insights for patients, families, and healthcare professionals. By bridging scientific research with practical applications, this educational content enhances understanding of bipolar disorder's complex neurobiology and empowers listeners with knowledge about current treatment options and lifestyle interventions.
summary_zh: 本期内容全面解析了双相情感障碍的生物机制与治疗方法，从锂盐的发现历程到现代治疗方案，从神经保护到生活方式调整，揭示了情绪障碍与创造力的奇妙联系。这不仅为患者和家属提供了科学知识，也让听众了解了脑科学在精神卫生领域的应用价值。
best_quote_en: Lithium works, in part by reducing inflammation, providing neuroprotection and supporting the interoceptive neural circuits affected in bipolar disorder.
best_quote_zh: 锂盐通过减少炎症、提供神经保护和支持受影响的内感觉神经回路来发挥作用。

title: You Won’t Believe My Morning
summary_en: The essay transforms a mundane morning into a mind‑bending exploration of scale, using the author’s accidental shrink‑down to illustrate the hidden dimensions of the COVID‑19 pandemic. By juxtaposing the microscopic world of tiny humans with our macroscopic concerns, the piece offers a vivid, interdisciplinary lens that blends science, satire, and storytelling. Its core insight—that perspective shifts can reframe complex problems—makes it a valuable resource for readers seeking both educational entertainment and a fresh analytical framework for global health challenges. The narrative’s creative use of analogy and its layered humor invite readers to question assumptions about size, impact, and responsibility, positioning the work as both a cultural commentary and a pedagogical tool. This approach exemplifies how imaginative writing can democratize scientific concepts, fostering public engagement with topics that typically reside in specialized discourse.
summary_zh: 这篇文章将平凡的早晨转化为一场关于尺度的奇幻之旅，通过作者意外的微缩经历揭示新冠疫情的深层意义。它以生动的微观世界和宏观视角交织科学、讽刺与讲故事，提供了一个跨学科的解析框架。核心观点是改变视角能重新定义复杂问题，既是文化批判，也是教育利器。文章巧妙的比喻和幽默感促使读者反思规模、影响与责任，从而以通俗方式普及科学知识，激发公众对全球卫生挑战的参与。
best_quote_en: SARS‑CoV‑2 is a standard sized Coronavirus—about 120 nanometers in diameter. 120 nanometers is ridiculously small in your world, but in ours, you can roll it around in your fingers.
best_quote_zh: 新冠病毒是标准的冠状病毒，直径约120纳米。在你们的世界里，这非常微小，但在我们这里，你可以把它捧在手心。

title: Abundant Intelligence
summary_en: The article envisions an era where AI becomes a fundamental economic engine, perhaps even a basic human right, driving unprecedented demand for compute power. It outlines a bold ambition to construct a weekly gigawatt factory for AI infrastructure, tackling challenges from chip design to energy and robotics. The author argues that scaling compute will unlock transformative applications—curing cancer, personalized global tutoring—and that the bottleneck is not desire but capacity. By positioning this massive undertaking as the "coolest and most important infrastructure project ever," the piece blends visionary optimism with a pragmatic roadmap, highlighting geopolitical competition and novel financing ideas. It invites readers to consider the societal implications of abundant AI, the ethical weight of choosing which problems to solve first, and the collective effort required to turn speculative dreams into tangible reality.
summary_zh: 这篇文章描绘了 AI 成为经济基石的未来愿景，甚至被视为基本人权，计算力的扩张成为核心驱动力。作者提出建设每周一吉瓦的 AI 基础设施工厂，跨越芯片、能源、建筑和机器人等全栈创新，以期通过计算突破解决癌症和全球个性化教育等重大挑战。文章既表达了雄心勃勃的远景，也揭示了地缘政治竞争与创新融资的紧迫性，引发我们对技术力量、社会责任和人类选择的深刻反思。
best_quote_en: If AI stays on the trajectory that we think it will, then amazing things will be possible. Maybe with 10 gigawatts of compute, AI can figure out how to cure cancer.
best_quote_zh: 如果 AI 保持我们认为的轨迹，那么神奇的事情将是可能的。也许用 10 吉瓦计算，AI 可以找出治愈癌症的方法。

title: How Worldy Is the World Cup?
summary_en: Anthony Lane’s 2026 World Cup commentary offers a sharp, nostalgic critique of football’s diminishing capacity for genuine surprise. He traces the tournament’s expansion—from 32 to 48 teams—as a hopeful antidote to homogenization, yet laments how commercial imperatives and global scouting have turned exceptional talent into pre‑packaged commodities. Lane juxtaposes the romance of early‑era legends like Pelé, whose rarity amplified myth, with today’s hyper‑visibility, where every player is already a global brand before stepping onto the pitch. The piece also examines cultural hospitality in the United States, contrasting it with political tensions, and reflects on coaching philosophies, from Thomas Tuchel’s bracing honesty to the perils of over‑confidence. Ultimately, Lane suggests that the World Cup’s power to challenge the status quo is eroding, raising questions about the balance between sport as spectacle and sport as a canvas for unexpected human drama.
summary_zh: 安东尼·莱恩的2026年世界杯评论犀利地指出，足球赛事的惊喜感正逐渐消失。他探讨了从32到48支球队的扩张，虽带来希望，却因商业化和全球人才发掘而使传奇球员提前商品化。文章对比了早期梅西等球星的稀有魅力与当今的全面曝光，揭示了体育从纯粹竞赛向品牌化娱乐的转变。同时，莱恩也描绘了美国的热情好客与政治现实，并反思了教练策略，从图赫尔直言不讳到各国球队的傲慢。这些观察反映出世界杯在挑战现状方面的局限，引发对现代体育本质的深刻思考。
best_quote_en: Never before has a World Cup final been graced by a halftime spectacle.
best_quote_zh: 从未有过世界杯决赛有过半场表演的壮观场面。

title: It’s 2020 and you’re in the future
summary_en: This witty, data‑driven essay marks the arrival of the 2020s and invites readers to compare how temporal distances have shifted since the 1920s. By juxtaposing historical milestones—World War II, the Soviet collapse, Super Bowl counts, iconic films, and even the O.J. Simpson trial—it shows how events once considered ancient now feel immediate. The piece highlights generational perception gaps, notes that today’s children may live into the 2100s, and encourages a reflective appreciation of the present. Wait But Why’s characteristic blend of humor, visual timelines, and thoughtful commentary makes complex perspective‑shifting accessible and engaging, turning a simple New Year’s post into a lasting meditation on how we experience time.
summary_zh: 本文以幽默的方式对比历史事件的时间距离，指出2020年正如1920年那样令人向往，同时提醒我们如何看待战争、文化、体育等变化，引发对时间流逝和代际差距的思考，是一篇引人入胜的教育性文章。通过图表和生动的例子，它让读者意识到自己出生时间的相对位置，并提出了一个惊人的预测：如今的孩子大多能活到2100年代，引发对未来生活的思考。
best_quote_en: When World War 2 started, the Civil War felt as far away to Americans as WW2 feels to us now.
best_quote_zh: 当第二次世界大战开始时，美国人觉得内战就像我们现在觉得二战一样遥远。

title: A peek into the post-capitalist dystopia
title_zh: 窥探后资本主义反乌托邦
summary_en: The essay offers a vivid, first‑hand portrait of San Francisco as a harbinger of a post‑capitalist future shaped by near‑solved artificial intelligence. The author, a young tech explorer, juxtaposes the city’s glittering startup culture with stark visible inequality—homeless encampments beside billboards celebrating founders—illustrating a society where AI’s economic benefits accrue to a narrow equity‑holding class. By highlighting the growing schism between AI‑adjacent beneficiaries and those facing displacement, the piece critiques the assumption that technological progress alone guarantees shared prosperity. It warns that when intelligence can be bought as compute, traditional labor may become obsolete, creating a permanent underclass that is economically unnecessary yet materially present. The narrative also calls for broader public literacy about AI fundamentals, urging both engineers and service workers to anticipate automation’s societal impact. Ultimately, the blog serves as both a cautionary tale and a call to action, urging society to steer technology toward inclusive outcomes before the singularity reshapes power structures beyond repair.
summary_zh: 旧金山已成为后资本主义时代的缩影，AI 红利集中于少数股权持有者，而劳动阶级被边缘化。作者警告，若不普及AI 基础知识，全社会可能步入不平等的硅谷式未来。
best_quote_en: Intelligence is close to being solved.
best_quote_zh: 智能已接近被解决.

title: Better Than Free: How To Differentiate In The Age Of AI
title_zh: 超越免费：在AI时代如何实现差异化
summary_en: Kevin Kelly’s essay reframes the creator’s economy for the age of AI, arguing that when perfect copies become free and abundant, the scarce assets are the intangibles that cannot be duplicated. He identifies eight “generatives”—immediacy, personalization, interpretation, authenticity, accessibility, embodiment, scarcity, and trust—that retain value because they must be generated uniquely in each exchange. The piece blends historical perspective (from analog scarcity to digital abundance) with concrete examples, from hardcover books to Patreon-backed novels, illustrating how artists, writers, and entrepreneurs can monetize experiences, relationships, and expertise rather than mere copies. Kelly’s insight is both a warning and a roadmap: the future belongs to those who can cultivate generative qualities that AI cannot replicate. For creators, policymakers, and business strategists, the essay offers a provocative lens on differentiation, urging a shift from selling products to selling the irreducible human elements of creation.
summary_zh: 凯文·凯利指出，在AI时代，完美复制品免费泛滥，人类必须出售那些无法复制的无形资产：即时性、个性化、解读、真实性、可及性、实体性、稀缺性和信任感等八种“生成性”价值。这些不可复制的品质成为新的商业核心，指引创作者从出售复制品转向出售独特的人类体验与关系。
best_quote_en: When copies are super abundant, they become worthless, and stuff which can't be copied becomes scarce and valuable.
best_quote_zh: 当复制品极其丰富时，它们就会变得一文不值，而那些无法被复制的东西则会变得稀缺和有价值。

title: What I Worked On
summary_en: This reflective essay traces the author’s early fascination with programming, from punch‑card Fortran on an IBM 1401 to the DIY microcomputers of the late 1970s, and his subsequent pivot from AI research to art. It captures the excitement of discovering Lisp, the disillusionment with shallow natural‑language AI, and the eventual decision to write "On Lisp" while pursuing a Ph.D. in computer science. The narrative reveals how personal curiosity, rather than formal curricula, shaped his trajectory, highlighting the tension between building fleeting systems and creating lasting works. It also offers a rare insider view of the birth of Y Combinator and the evolution of startup culture, underscoring the importance of independent thinking in rapidly changing fields. The piece is both an inspiring origin story and a thoughtful commentary on the nature of technological progress.
summary_zh: 作者从IBM 1401的穿孔卡编程，到DIY微型电脑，再到AI研究的迷茫与艺术的觉醒，讲述了个人好奇心如何塑造了从编程到艺术的旅程。文章揭示了Lisp的魅力、早期AI的局限，以及对持久创作的追求，反映了独立思考在快速变革领域的价值。
best_quote_en: AI, as practiced at the time, was a hoax.
best_quote_zh: 当时的 AI 实践本质上是一个骗局.

title: What is Current AI-Risks and the Points？
summary_en: The article offers a thoughtful examination of contemporary AI‑related risks, distinguishing between enterprise‑level and personal‑use challenges. It highlights security vulnerabilities, illustrated by real‑world incidents such as the exploitation of Claude in a geopolitical context, and stresses the growing difficulty of maintaining control over information workflows as AI processes ever‑larger, often unverifiable data sets. The author also warns of physical and psychological health impacts, including ergonomic strain and the erosion of personal autonomy through AI‑mediated emotional optimization. By categorizing these issues and proposing new frameworks for observation and mitigation, the piece serves as both an educational overview and a call to action for developers, managers, and users. Its interdisciplinary perspective bridges technical safety, organizational responsibility, and human‑centered concerns, making it a valuable resource for anyone seeking to understand the multifaceted dangers of today’s AI landscape and to navigate the ethical and practical dilemmas they present.
summary_zh: 本文从企业与个人双重视角剖析了当前AI风险，包括安全漏洞、责任模糊、信息过载导致的认知退化，以及AI可能“优化”用户主观状态引发的心理自主流失。通过梳理这些挑战，作者呼吁建立系统性观察机制，以应对AI日益普及对人类心理的潜在影响。
best_quote_en: AI might oddly 'optimize' people's subjective states themselves.
best_quote_zh: AI 可能会奇异地‘优化’人们的主体状态本身。

title: Florentina Holzinger’s Naked Ambition
summary_en: The article profiles artist Florentina Holzinger and her provocative installation "SEAWORLD VENICE" at the Venice Biennale. Known for extreme performance art that pushes bodily limits, Holzinger’s work combines nudity, water tanks, and ritualistic actions. She submerges herself and other performers in a tank of filtered visitor urine, creating tableaux that confront crisis and the body while challenging audience comfort. Holzinger describes her approach as gentle rather than shocking, emphasizing a desire not to traumatize viewers permanently. The piece’s logistical complexities and its blend of minimalism with raw physicality have made it the most discussed work at the Biennale, prompting reflection on the boundaries of contemporary art and the role of the body as both medium and message.
summary_zh: Holzinger 的双年展装置让裸体表演者浸泡在过滤过的尿液中，正视危机与身体极限。她将激进艺术描述为温和的挑战，重新定义当代戏剧的界限。
best_quote_en: "It gets depicted as this shocking, radical thing, but if you come from experimental theatre there is nothing shocking or radical about it," she said.
best_quote_zh: "她说，‘这被描绘成一个令人震惊、激进的东西，但如果你来自实验戏剧，就不会觉得它有任何震撼或激进性。’"

title: Earnestness
summary_en: The essay reflects on earnestness as a rare but powerful catalyst in startup culture, contrasting genuine curiosity with mercenary motives. Jessica and the author value founders who are both formidable and earnest—driven by the problem itself rather than wealth or fame. This authenticity, rooted in "nerd" identity, fuels resilience and deep focus, turning vulnerability into strength when challenges outpace superficial solutions. The piece maps domains where earnestness thrives—technology, science, and innovative business—against those where cynicism dominates, suggesting a heuristic: follow fields where nerds lead. It also notes the tension between naive optimism and sophisticated cynicism, arguing that the former can compensate for rapid change and unlock previously insoluble problems. Ultimately, the alignment of intellectual curiosity and financial reward marks a historic shift, making earnest startups not just morally commendable but practically unstoppable.
summary_zh: 真诚是创业者美德，也是驱动创新的持久动力。当以问题本身为兴趣，而非功利目的，便能穿越快速变化的迷雾。真诚虽带来脆弱，却在艰难挑战中化为优势，提醒我们商业不应与知识 curiosity 脱节。真诚的创业者如同「极客」，他们愿意牺牲表面 cool，专注于真正重要的事情。这种纯粹的热情在科技与创新领域开花结果，也塑造了更具活力的商业生态。
best_quote_en: When you call someone earnest, you're making a statement about their motives. It means both that they're doing something for the right reasons, and that they're trying as hard as they can.
best_quote_zh: 当你称某人为人真诚时，你就是在评论他的动机。这意味着他们为了正确的理由在做事，并且尽力而为。

title: NameRank: The Model Knows Your Project, Not You.
title_zh: NameRank：模型认识你的项目，而非你自己
summary_en: The discussion unpacks the surprising asymmetry of AI memory: well‑known projects often eclipse their creators in large language models, while famous individuals may still be obscure to the same systems. Commenters illustrate this with concrete examples—Tianshou’s library outranking its author Jiayi Weng—and reflect on why artifacts propagate faster than names, citing data from the NameRank study. Personal anecdotes reveal practical hurdles, such as being absent from Common Crawl or having private repositories, which hinder model recognition. The conversation raises broader questions about digital legacy, the economics of attention, and the ethics of training data. It suggests that current AI architectures prioritize textual footprints over authorial identity, prompting a reevaluation of how we curate and share our work to ensure both projects and people are accurately represented in future models.
summary_zh: AI 记忆展现出惊人反差：知名项目常盖过创作者，而名人却可能被模型忽视。评论引用 Tianshou 与作者 Jiayi Weng 的数据对比，指出作品传播远胜于姓名传播。个人经历显示，缺失 Common Crawl 收录或私有仓库等现实障碍，影响模型对个人的识别。这引发对数字遗产、注意力经济与训练数据伦理的反思，提示我们需重新考量如何平衡项目与人名的曝光。
best_quote_en: Pair a well-known artifact with the person who built it and, in 7 of 10 pairs, the artifact wins. The reinforcement-learning library Tianshou scores 0.78 while its sole author Jiayi Weng sits at 0.22 — the work propagated; the name behind it did not.
best_quote_zh: 将知名作品与创建者配对，在10对中的7对中，作品胜出。强化学习库Tianshou的得分是0.78，而其唯一作者Jiayi Weng仅为0.22——作品传播了，但名字没有。

title: Accelerate Learning & Increase Cognitive Capacity | Dr. Tommy Wood
title_zh: 加速学习与提升认知能力 | 汤米·伍德博士
summary_en: This episode with Dr. Tommy Wood offers a comprehensive guide to enhancing cognitive capacity through science-based approaches. As a neuroscience professor at the University of Washington, Dr. Wood reveals how specific exercise protocols, nutritional strategies, and targeted compounds can accelerate learning and stabilize mental skill development. The content bridges theoretical neuroscience with practical applications, providing actionable tools for both performance optimization and brain health preservation. Key insights include the role of novel tasks in stimulating neuroplasticity, the importance of nutrient timing for cognitive function, and evidence-based approaches to reducing dementia risk. The episode particularly stands out for its balanced perspective on cognitive enhancement—addressing both high-performance goals and recovery from brain injuries. Dr. Wood's expertise lends credibility to recommendations ranging from HIIT workouts and resistance training to omega-3 supplementation and GLP-1 compounds, making this valuable for anyone interested in optimizing their learning capacity and long-term brain health.
summary_zh: 汤米·伍德博士与我们分享了神经科学的最新发现，揭示了如何通过科学方法提升认知能力。他不仅介绍了促进神经可塑性的运动策略，还详细阐述了营养和补充剂在学习中的作用。这期内容非常实用，既关注高性能训练，也关心脑损伤后的恢复。听完后，我对大脑的适应能力有了新的认识，并学到了许多可以立即应用的方法来改善学习效果和保护脑健康。
best_quote_en: We have tools now to preserve cognitive function, reduce dementia risk, and offset loss of memory after a concussion or other brain injury—tools that are science-based and practical.
best_quote_zh: 我们现在拥有科学实用的工具，可以保护认知功能，降低痴呆风险，并帮助从脑震荡或其他脑损伤中恢复记忆力。

title: The New Yorker Festival Offers a First Look at Its 2026 Lineup
title_zh: 纽约客2026年节目录销预览
summary_en: The New Yorker Festival offers a tantalizing glimpse into its 2026 lineup, signaling the magazine’s enduring role as a cultural hub. Early tickets for subscribers sold out quickly, with general availability slated for July 23, underscoring the event’s prestige. The program features a stellar roster— Gloria Steinem discussing activism with Jia Tolentino, comedian Cole Escola sharing humor with Julian Lucas, Parker Posey reflecting on performance with Michael Schulman, and musicians like King Princess and Wynton Marsalis offering artistic insights. Intellectual depth continues with panels on America’s meaning, AI and democracy, and freedom’s politics, moderated by leading writers. These conversations blend literature, entertainment, psychology, economics, and social critique, suggesting the festival’s mission to weave together diverse voices. For readers, the festival is not just a ticketed series but a curated immersion into contemporary thought, promising inspiration and a sense of belonging to an ongoing dialogue. The limited‑edition tote and exclusive perks further cement its status as a must‑attend cultural event.
summary_zh: 纽约客2026年节庆首曝阵容，汇聚文学、娱乐、思想大咖。订阅者优先购票，7月23日对外开售。活动涵盖对话、表演、论坛，展现文化交融与思想碰撞，令人期待。
best_quote_en: The New Yorker Festival, the magazine’s annual celebration of culture and ideas, will return October 23rd to 25th, in New York City.
best_quote_zh: 《纽约客》节庆是杂志年度文化与思想的盛会，将于10月23日至25日重返纽约市。

title: Mary Wept Over the Feet of Jesus / Rad American Women A-Z
title_zh: 玛丽跪在耶稣脚下 / 激进美国女性 A-Z
summary_en: This dual review juxtaposes two unconventional graphic‑book projects that challenge readers’ assumptions about history and belief. Chester Brown’s *Mary Wept Over the Feet of Jesus* re‑examines biblical prostitution narratives, arguing that Jesus never condemned sex workers and speculating that Mary herself may have been one. Brown’s meticulous research notes and disarmingly innocent illustrations create a thought‑process‑like artifact that is both intellectually rigorous and emotionally resonant, though its provocative thesis can alienate faith‑driven audiences. In contrast, *Rad American Women A‑Z* offers an accessible, alphabet‑structured feminist primer that celebrates radical women through vivid illustrations and action‑oriented biographies. Designed for young readers and adults alike, it blends education with empowerment, turning historical herstory into a call‑to‑action list of “26 Things That You Can Do To Be Rad.” Together, the books demonstrate how graphic media can serve as vehicles for scholarly inquiry, social critique, and inspirational pedagogy, expanding the boundaries of both comics and public discourse.
summary_zh: 这两本图画书各自以独特视角审视历史与信仰：布朗通过对圣经中妓女故事的重新解读，提出耶稣并未谴责性工作，并大胆猜测玛利亚可能曾是妓女； Schatz与Stahl则用字母表形式，用生动插图和行动导向的传记，讲述了美国女性的激进史，旨在从小就灌输赋权意识。它们共同证明，漫画不仅是娱乐，更是学术探究、社会批判和启蒙教育的载体，丰富了这一媒介的可能。阅读它们时，我们既惊叹于作者的勇气，也意识到历史书写与性别叙事的力量。
best_quote_en: Mary Wept Over the Feet of Jesus is basically Chester Brown’s presentation of his belief that Jesus did not condemn prostitutes or prostitutions and that it is very possible that his own mother, Mary, may have been a prostitute.
best_quote_zh: 《玛丽跪在耶稣脚下》基本上是切斯特·布朗对耶稣没有谴责妓女的信仰的呈现，他认为耶稣可能认为自己的母亲玛利亚曾经是一个妓女。

title: From posh egg cups to secondhand lamps: 22 cheap ways to make your home look more expensive
title_zh: 从昂贵的蛋盅到二手灯具：22个让你的家看起来更昂贵的方法
summary_en: This article showcases how everyday shoppers can elevate their interiors without breaking the bank. By highlighting 22 affordable finds—from a £2 stainless‑steel egg cup to a £45 nautical print—the piece demonstrates that good taste is less about budget and more about strategic sourcing. The author blends personal anecdotes with practical tips, emphasizing timeless design, quality materials, and the power of curated accessories. It challenges the assumption that luxury home décor is reserved for high‑end budgets, offering a curated guide that proves thoughtful choices and a keen eye can transform any space into something that feels upscale. The piece also subtly critiques fast‑fashion interior trends, advocating for sustainable, lasting investments over fleeting fads.
summary_zh: 这篇文章展示了普通消费者如何用平价用品提升家居格调。从2英镑的钢制蛋盅到45英镑的航海主题印刷品，作者分享了22个经济实惠的装饰妙招，强调好品味不等于高消费，而是讲究选材、品质和经典设计。通过个人经历和实用建议，文章打破了“奢华家居需大钱”的观念，倡导通过精心挑选和耐看单品，实现家居空间的升级，同时呼吁抵制快速时尚家居潮流，选择更可持续的投资。
best_quote_en: Good taste doesn’t have to cost a fortune.
best_quote_zh: 好品味不必花大钱。

title: Billionaires Build
summary_en: This essay merges two planned pieces: how to ace a Y Combinator interview and why becoming a billionaire isn’t about exploiting people. The author, a professional “billionaire scout,” explains that YC seeks founders who truly understand a user group and can deliver something people want—its motto, after all, is “Make something people want.” He outlines key heuristics: identify a larval market, secure early adopters who crave the product, and be ready to teach partners about users. He warns against turning the interview into a canned pitch, urges honesty, and stresses that successful startups must delight users to grow. The piece also debunks the political narrative that wealth equals exploitation, noting the weak or inverse correlation between unethical behavior and riches. By blending practical interview advice with cultural commentary, the author encourages founders to focus on genuine user needs rather than shortcuts, offering a nuanced view of social mobility and wealth creation.
summary_zh: 本文融合YC面试技巧与财富真相，指出成功关键在于理解用户需求、打造“larval 市场”，并揭露“剥削致富”的谬论，同时批判政客将财富归因于剥削的错误观点，呼吁创业者专注真实价值与用户体验。
best_quote_en: Make something people want.
best_quote_zh: 打造用户想要的东西。

title: Maine’s Mad Scramble to Replace Graham Platner
title_zh: 缅因州疯狂的竞选来取代格雷厄姆·普拉特纳
summary_en: The article chronicles a frantic, three‑week scramble by Maine Democrats to replace scandal‑tainted Senate candidate Graham Platner after a sexual‑assault allegation surfaced. Former congressional staffer Jordan Wood, who had earlier lost a House race, re‑enters the race amid a crowded field of candidates ranging from establishment figures to progressive insurgents. The piece details the high‑stakes delegate‑selection process, the role of local party insiders, and how a tragic ICE shooting briefly refocused attention on the election’s stakes. It offers a nuanced look at intra‑party dynamics, the impact of personal scandals on voter trust, and the paradox of televised debates in a race decided by just 601 delegates. The narrative underscores the tension between grassroots momentum and institutional maneuvering, revealing how quickly political fortunes can shift when scandal and tragedy intersect.
summary_zh: 缅因州民主党人为取代遭污名化的参议员候选人格雷厄姆·普拉特纳展开了紧张的角逐。文章聚焦于前国会议员助理乔丹·伍德重新加入竞选的经过，描绘了包括进步派和建制派在内的众多竞争者，以及复杂的六百零一名代表选拔机制。冰岛移民遭枪击事件短暂转移了公众关注，凸显了选举的紧要性。报道深刻剖析了政党内部的权力博弈、丑闻对选民信任的影响，以及电视辩论在小规模代表制下的矛盾性，反映出政治态势瞬息万变。
best_quote_en: Hope has two beautiful daughters. One is anger at the way things are, and we have a lot of anger at the way things are. But the second is courage—the courage and determination to make things better, and we need to hold on to courage.
best_quote_zh: 希望有两个美丽的女儿。第一个是愤怒，愤怒于现状；第二个是勇气，勇气和决心去改善事物，我们需要坚守勇气。

title: The Tim Ferriss Show Transcripts: Dr. Andrew Huberman — Peptides, Performance, and Protocols (#876)
title_zh: 《蒂姆·费里斯秀》 transcripts：胡伯曼博士——肽、表现与协议 (#876)
summary_en: The Tim Ferriss Show transcript features Dr. Andrew Huberman diving into peptides, performance protocols, and the science of human optimization. The conversation weaves together cutting‑edge research on neurobiology, discussions of elite athletes like Dean Potter and Dorian Yates, and practical strategies for channeling energy into purposeful pursuits rather than destructive competition. Huberman’s expert insights reveal how mindset, physiology, and lifestyle intersect to elevate performance, offering actionable protocols for bio‑hackers, athletes, and curious learners. The episode serves as both an educational deep‑dive and an inspirational look at pushing human limits, updating readers on the latest peptide developments and holistic frameworks for personal growth.
summary_zh: 胡伯曼博士在《蒂姆·费里斯秀》中分享了关于肽、能量管理与运动表现的最新科学协议，探讨了从极限运动员到神经科学的跨领域洞察，激发读者优化身心潜能的探索热情。
best_quote_en: That’s all we’ve got. That’s all we’ve got.
best_quote_zh: 这就是我们所拥有的。就是这样。
